basic_details.job_title: NIPER Guwahati Estate & Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER), Guwahati
basic_details.short_information: NIPER Guwahati is recruiting 01 Estate & Security Officer post on regular basis with Pay Level-10.

application_fee.details: Fee is non-refundable. Pay online through the portal.

age_limit.details: Maximum age not exceeding 45 years as on the closing date. Age relaxation applicable as per GoI rules for SC/ST/OBC/ PwBD/ Ex-Servicemen/ Departmental candidates.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date. | Essential Qualification: Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institute. | Experience: 5 years of experience in commissioned service in Army/Navy/Air Force/Para Military Force or Police (not below the rank of Captain or equivalent / Dy. SP of Police). | Desirable: Experience in supervision and maintenance of campus in National Institutes. | Nationality: Indian Citizens only.

selection_process: Selection will be based on Screening / Written Test / Skill Test / Interview as decided by the Institute. Shortlisting will be done based on qualifications and experience. The decision of the Institute shall be final.
how_to_apply: Apply online through www.niperguwahati.ac.in from 02/07/2026 to 31/07/2026.
Download and print the completed application form.
Send the signed hard copy along with all self-attested documents by Speed Post / Courier to the address below, so as to reach by 07/08/2026.
important_instructions: This is a regular appointment with probation period. Candidates in Government service must apply through proper channel or produce NOC. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Visit the official website regularly for updates. Legal jurisdiction: Guwahati.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Guwahati Estate & Security Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER), Guwahati, an Institute of National Importance under the Department of Pharmaceuticals, Ministry of Chemicals & Fertilizers, Govt. of India, has invited online applications for the regular Non-Teaching post. The notification includes complete details on qualifications, experience, pay, reservation, and application instructions. Candidates are advised to read the full notification before applying. Download NIPER Guwahati Estate & Security Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIPER Guwahati Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIPER Guwahati is recruiting 01 Estate & Security Officer post on regular basis with Pay Level-10.

rows.event: Last Date for Online Application & Fee
Last Date for Receipt of Hard Copy

content_sections.heading: NIPER Guwahati Estate & Security Officer - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date. Essential Qualification: Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institute. Experience: 5 years of experience in commissioned service in Army/Navy/Air Force/Para Military Force or Police (not below the rank of Captain or equivalent / Dy. SP of Police). Desirable: Experience in supervision and maintenance of campus in National Institutes. Nationality: Indian Citizens only.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Guwahati Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age not exceeding 45 years as on the closing date. Age relaxation applicable as per GoI rules for SC/ST/OBC/ PwBD/ Ex-Servicemen/ Departmental candidates.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee is non-refundable. Pay online through the portal.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Screening / Written Test / Skill Test / Interview as decided by the Institute. Shortlisting will be done based on qualifications and experience. The decision of the Institute shall be final.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIPER Guwahati Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Apply online through www.niperguwahati.ac.in from 02/07/2026 to 31/07/2026. Pay the fee online. Download and print the completed application form. Send the signed hard copy along with all self-attested documents by Speed Post / Courier to the address below, so as to reach by 07/08/2026.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is a regular appointment with probation period. Candidates in Government service must apply through proper channel or produce NOC. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Visit the official website regularly for updates. Legal jurisdiction: Guwahati.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIPER Guwahati Estate & Security Officer 2026?
faq.answer: Online application closes on 31 July 2026, and hard copy must reach by 07 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for NIPER Guwahati Estate & Security Officer?
faq.answer: Pay Level-10 with basic pay starting at ₹56,100/- plus allowances as per 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for NIPER NT-02 post?
faq.answer: Bachelor’s degree + 5 years commissioned service in Armed Forces / Para Military / Police (Captain or Dy. SP rank).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation in NIPER Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, as per GoI norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen and 5 years for departmental candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for NIPER Guwahati Non-Teaching Recruitment?
faq.answer: Apply online on the official website and send the hard copy with documents by post.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for NIPER Guwahati application?
faq.answer: Age proof, degree certificates, experience certificates, caste/EWS certificate (if applicable), etc.

faq.question: Q7. Is the NIPER Estate & Security Officer post permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, it is a regular position with probation as per Institute norms.
